name: Forget, Anticipate and Adapt: Test Time Training for Long Videos
snippet: Test Time Training (TTT) is a mechanism in which a model adapts to an incoming test-sample. This procedure does not require labels at test-time.

name: Learning to (Learn at Test Time): RNNs with Expressive Hidden States
snippet: Since the hidden state is updated by training even on test sequences, our layers are called Test-Time Training (TTT) layers.

name: [PDF] Test-Time Prompt Tuning for Zero-Shot Generalization in Vision
snippet: The tuned prompt is adapted to each task, making it suitable for zero-shot generalization without requiring any task-specific training data or annotations.

name: [PDF] The Surprising Effectiveness of Test-Time Training for Few-Shot
snippet: Test-time training (TTT) enables parametric models to adapt during inference through dynamic parameter updates in re- sponse to each test input.
